title: Swiss Wealth Protection Platform
description: Swiss wealth protection platform with gold and silver vaulting, global payments, native mobile banking features, and a Nuxt.js web platform for wealth management.
impact: Built secure native mobile and Nuxt.js web experiences for wealth protection, vaulting, global payments, multi-currency workflows, and real-time financial data synchronization.
responsibilities: Developed native mobile application features with secure banking workflows, payment processing, and account management.
Built Nuxt.js and Vue.js web platform features for wealth management dashboards and transaction systems.
Implemented secure authentication flows for financial account access.
Supported multi-currency functionality and global payment workflows.
Integrated banking APIs and real-time financial data synchronization across mobile and web experiences.
achievements: Delivered secure wealth management experiences for gold and silver vaulting workflows.
Built cross-platform financial product features spanning native mobile and Nuxt.js web interfaces.
Improved account, transaction, and payment visibility through real-time synchronized financial data.
